## Description

 

For over 60 years, the Goizper Group has been designing and manufacturing high quality sprayers for the Automotive, Industrial, Janitorial, and Construction sectors from their state-of-the-art European facilities, developing a reputation as a true leader in the industry.  

- Self-Contained with Everything You'll Need to Get Spraying Right Away - Save Money, No Gas or Electric Pressure Washer Needed!

- All iK Sprayers Are Equipped With the Highest Quality FPM, Viton Seals and Washers

- All iK Polypropylene and Polyethylene Tanks are Heavy Duty Injection Molded

- Wider Mouth and Funnel Opening Create An Easy Filling Process and Easy Cleaning Process

- All iK Hoses are Made of Strong PVC with the Perfect Amount of Flexibility

- All iK Sprayers Come with Pressure Relief Safety Valves

FEATURES: 

- Translucent tank with level indicator

- Base for greater stability

- Large opening easy filling

- Safety lock

- Safety valve with depressurisation option

- Protective sleeve for valve chamber

- Ability to identify content via coloured caps

- Option of fitting other types of nozzles and accessories

- Easy assembly and taking apart for cleaning and maintenance, tool free

- Translucent tank with level indicator

- Base for greater stability 

 

REFER TO THE IK  LINK BELOW FOR INFORMATION ON SPRAYER CLEANING/MAINTENANCE AND SAFETY RULES

[IK MULTI PRO 2 Instruction Manual](https://www.theragcompany.com/content/instruction-manual.pdf)

S. 

Heavy-Duty Sprayer** The iK MULTI 2 Professional Grade Hand Pump Sprayer is hands down one of the best sprayers I’ve used for detailing and cleaning. Right out of the box, it feels durable and well-built, with a heavy-duty polypropylene/polyethylene tank that can handle acids, alcohols, alkalines, hydrocarbons, and oils without any issues.

One of the standout features is the adjustable conical and fan nozzles, which allow for precise or wide spray patterns depending on the job. The pressure release valve at 45 psi is a great safety feature, and the safety lock trigger prevents accidental spraying.

The stable base is a much-needed upgrade, preventing it from tipping over,

and the large filling mouth makes refilling easy with no mess. I also appreciate the color-coded handle tips along with the storage handle (blue/green) for quick chemical identification—super useful in a busy detailing environment.

If you need a professional-grade sprayer for detailing, cleaning, or janitorial work, this is a must-have. Solid construction, smart design, and reliable performance—I highly recommend it!

⭐️ Not recommended for foam ⭐️
